title: Ultimate Test: Levain Vs Crumbl | #shorts
full_text: hello Namaste almost Dr zag gar over here with my son and we are today doing something public service for the whole of America we have in front of us our two comparative patients one is the laen chocolate chip cookie and one is the crumble chocolate chip cookie V what are your first blush observations as a doctor in training this just looks like a typical chocolate chip cookie it looks kind of flat what look kind of boring this is I don't even know what this is it looks like a it looks like Bowser shell for Mario yeah but it kind of looks very toasted whereas this one looks a little like lacking in melatone and almost like it's wearing sunscreen or something if you had to pick one to bite which would you bite in this one this one really this one you have something against brownies you see how we are uncovering layers are being peeled layers of inside prejudices are being revealed I feel this one is the A+ let people see the side text oh wow that is not looking promising crumble cookie let us see what is going on ooh look at that it's so soft look at that look look do you want to take a bite wait mom you're not supposed to eat it no you're not supposed to eat it your doctor said no more sugar you were just doing this whole video just so you could eat the cookies but this is public service the doctor said do what you need to do to Serve the People
